summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only; no GitHub mutations are planned as executed. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling, already-closed PR #86078 is left closed, and non-security open PRs are kept open unless one has a hydrated replacement and prior closeout evidence.

actions.reason: Security-boundary workflow ownership and permissions hardening is out of scope for backlog cleanup automation.
Standalone non-security PR should stay open for maintainer review and validation, not be closed or merged from this inventory shard.
Security-audit detection for sensitive skill markdown/network behavior belongs to central OpenClaw security handling.
Open dmPolicy exposure audit work is security-sensitive and should be quarantined to central security triage.
Related to a live issue family but not closable or mergeable from this shard because validation/check status still needs maintainer handling.
Broad automation/runtime guardrail PR with dependency changes and current review blockers needs maintainer judgment; it should not be closed as inventory cleanup.
Related to an open voice-call issue but not closable or mergeable because required real behavior proof is missing.
Already closed in live preflight state; no close action is valid.
Fresh hydrated evidence shows a clearer open replacement and prior closeout rationale; closure is allowed for this open PR with target_updated_at.
Potential sensitive data exposure must route to central OpenClaw security handling, not backlog cleanup.

needs_human: #81786 requires maintainer judgment because it is a large automation/runtime guardrail PR with dependency changes and current ClawSweeper review blockers.
